CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-30-2015 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A) & (D). MASTER CALENDAR JURY TRIAL SET FOR 10/19/15 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL DATE OF TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
